description: A Phoenix LiveView Scroll Area component.
docs:
Add to the `html_helpers` function in your `my_app_web.ex`:

    import MyAppWeb.Components.UI.ScrollArea

Replace `MyAppWeb` with your application's module prefix.

files.content:
defmodule MyAppWeb.Components.UI.ScrollArea do use Phoenix.Component attr :class, :string, default: nil attr :rest, :global slot :inner_block, required: true def scroll_area(assigns) do ~H"""
{render_slot(@inner_block)}
""" end end

name: scroll-area
title: Scroll Area
